tasks.title: Stage changes selectively for first commit
tasks.description: Use git commands to stage a subset of changes separately for the first commit. This involves using 'git add' with specific files or interactive staging to separate changes logically.
acceptanceCriteria: Only intended files or changes are staged for the first commit
No unstaged changes remain for the first commit
tasks.expectedResult: A subset of changes is staged and ready for the first commit

evidence: git diff --cached shows only staged changes for first commit
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Prepares the first set of changes for a separate commit

tasks.title: Create first git commit with staged changes
tasks.description: Commit the currently staged changes with a descriptive commit message for the first logical change set.
acceptanceCriteria: A new commit is created with the staged changes
Commit message clearly describes the changes
tasks.expectedResult: First commit is created in local git history with the staged changes

evidence: git log shows the new commit with the correct message
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Creates the first separate commit in the git history

tasks.title: Stage remaining changes for second commit
tasks.description: Stage the remaining unstaged changes for the second commit using git add commands.
acceptanceCriteria: Remaining changes are staged for the second commit
No unstaged changes remain after staging
tasks.expectedResult: All remaining changes are staged and ready for the second commit

evidence: git diff --cached shows staged changes for second commit
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Prepares the second set of changes for a separate commit

tasks.title: Create second git commit with remaining changes
tasks.description: Commit the staged remaining changes with a descriptive commit message for the second logical change set.
acceptanceCriteria: Second commit is created with the staged changes
Commit message clearly describes the changes
tasks.expectedResult: Second commit is created in local git history with the staged changes

evidence: git log shows the new commit with the correct message
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Creates the second separate commit in the git history

tasks.title: Push commits to remote repository
tasks.description: Push the local commits to the remote git repository using 'git push'.
acceptanceCriteria: All local commits are pushed to the remote repository
tasks.expectedResult: Local commits are successfully pushed to the remote repository

metadata.inputContext: Local git commits ready to push
evidence: git status shows branch is up to date with remote
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Pushes the separate commits to the remote repository to share changes
